context.phi_280_is_different_quantity: kanna #280's phi_lo/phi_hi is the fern #274 num_stages=2 REALIZATION haircut, NOT this card's determinism-recovery phi.

synthesis.handoff_line: resolving #327's free recovery coefficient phi from the measured M=8 SDPA launch geometry: the non-reduction (M=8 x 8 q-head) axes fill only 6/80 SMs, so a deterministic SDPA forgoes geometric_phi = 92.5% of the split-KV parallelism (PR #39's 2D-vs-3D ratio corroborates at 77.4%), both ABOVE the #327 break-even phi* = 74.5% -> identity lane DEAD (C): floor 9.10% > budget 7.33%, compliant ceiling 474 TPS. UNDER THE #192 >500 DIRECTIVE this is reported against TWO budgets: the floor must clear the OPERATIVE >500 bar (4.022%, phi*_500 = 40.9%), STRICTLY tighter than the 7.33% no-regression bar (phi* = 74.5%) -> #192 band = RED: the geometric floor clears NEITHER, so the identity half is a >500 RED, not merely a no-regression miss (the YELLOW trap -- a 'B alive' under 500 -- is documented but the geometry does not even reach it). This CLOSES #327's open curvature toward (C) rather than reopening (B): the naive un-pack door (recover the slack by filling 64/80 SMs from non-reduction tiles) is REFUTED=True -- the deployed SDPA slack is measured on the 3D split-KV path, which already OVER-subscribes the machine (96 CTAs > 80 SMs) yet still sits at 34.9% BW, proving the slack is the low arithmetic-intensity floor (AI 7.88 << ridge 208), not occupancy. A deterministic kernel's un-pack ceiling (64 < adaptive 96) cannot exceed that saturated occupancy, so phi_realizable >= 1 and the lane stays (C) for EVERY realizable deterministic schedule. This pins #327's lower bracket from geometry (vs wirbel #326's config-only UPPER ceiling, not re-measured here); no kernel is built here (the custom SDPA reduction stays UNBUILT + human-approval-gated regardless). 0 TPS; analytic over banked numbers; BASELINE 481.53 unchanged. NOT a launch. NOT a build. NOT a served-file change.

step1_geometry.source: denken #291 verify_compute_hideability + kanna #280 roofline.json (measured M=8 SDPA, A10G) + PR #279 grid logic + splitkv_verify_patch/PR #39

step2_partition.non_reduction_axes: M query-rows x q-heads (BLOCK_Q tiling) -- FREE to a deterministic schedule. head_dim=256 is the QK^T contraction (reduction), excluded.
step2_partition.reduction_axis: KV-sequence split (NUM_PAR_SOFTMAX_SEGMENTS=16 online-softmax segments) -- FORGONE for determinism (fixed split + ordered combine).

step3_occupancy_phi.model: phi = 1 - min(1, N_nonreduction / SMs) = forgone-parallelism fraction = share of the machine the deterministic (non-reduction) schedule leaves idle.

synthesis.verdict: IDENTITY-LANE-DEAD-AT-GEOMETRIC-PHI: the M=8 SDPA decode geometry fills only 6/80 SMs from non-reduction (M x q-head) axes, so a deterministic (fixed-split, ordered-combine) SDPA forgoes geometric_phi = 92.5% of the split-KV parallelism (measured 2D-vs-3D corroboration 77.4%), both ABOVE the #327 break-even phi* = 74.5% -> floor 9.103% > budget 7.332% -> DEAD (C). #192 TWO-BUDGET BAND = RED (regress below the 481.53 baseline): the floor clears NEITHER the operative >500 bar (4.022%) NOR the no-regression bar (7.332%), so even the BEST defensible reading is not a >500 win. DECISIVE: the (B) door is geometrically CLOSED -- the deployed SDPA's exposed slack is measured on the 3D split-KV path, which ALREADY launches 96 CTAs > 80 SMs (occupancy-SATURATED) yet stays at 34.9% BW, so the slack is the low-AI attention floor (AI 7.88 << ridge 208), NOT occupancy-removable. A deterministic kernel's un-pack ceiling (64 tiles) is BELOW the adaptive 96, so it cannot exceed that saturated occupancy -> pays >= the full slack -> phi_realizable >= 1. The naive un-pack reading (phi=20% < phi*) -- the ONLY reading that would land GREEN-for-500 -- is the refuted mirage. Compliant ceiling 474 TPS (< 500). 0 TPS; analytic; NOT a launch.
